name: seoulcommerce-payment-gateway-for-tosspayments
description: SeoulCommerce payment gateway integration for TossPayments (WooCommerce)

scripts.build:zip: npm run build && OUT_DIR="$PWD" && BUILD_DIR="/tmp/seoulcommerce-tpg-build" && SLUG="seoulcommerce-payment-gateway-for-tosspayments" && ZIP_PATH="$OUT_DIR/${SLUG}.zip" && rm -rf "$BUILD_DIR" && rm -f "$ZIP_PATH" && mkdir -p "$BUILD_DIR/$SLUG" && cp -R assets build includes languages "$BUILD_DIR/$SLUG/" && cp tosspayments-gateway-for-woocommerce.php readme.txt readme-ko_KR.txt "$BUILD_DIR/$SLUG/" && cd "$BUILD_DIR" && zip -r "$ZIP_PATH" "$SLUG" -q && rm -rf "$BUILD_DIR" && echo "Done! Output: $ZIP_PATH"

author: seoulcommerce
